india.summary: Iran's Supreme Leader Ayatollah Ali Khamenei was buried in Mashhad after a week of ceremonies. He ruled Iran for nearly thirty-seven years and died in recent airstrikes. Large crowds gathered for funeral processions which brought daily life to a standstill. His eldest son led prayers, but his successor was notably absent from the burial. This burial occurred amid renewed hostilities and recent strikes between the US and Iran.

india.title: Quote of the day by Franz Kafka: 'There are some things one can achieve only by a deliberate leap in the opposite direction'
india.summary: True progress sometimes emerges from taking steps that seem counterproductive at first glance. Kafka's philosophy hints that, occasionally, achieving certain aspirations requires not only perseverance but also a deliberate detour. This notion extends into areas like psychology and artistic pursuits. In our rapidly evolving modern world, the strategy of intentional breaks becomes increasingly significant. Unlike aimlessly abandoning a direction, a well-considered pivot can yield transformative results.

india.summary: Diogenes, the radical philosopher, famously threw away his cup when he witnessed a child quenching thirst using only their hands. This timeless tale encourages us to challenge our reliance on luxuries and conveniences. Cynic philosophy suggests that true freedom is found in having fewer possessions. In today's complex world, embracing simplicity can enhance our well-being, reminding us that valuable insights often arise from keen observation rather than formal learning.
